name: ClinicalTrials.gov senolytics registry surveillance follow-up 3

scope.question: Run a source-snapshot-backed ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance pass for NCT03430037, NCT03675724, senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting terms.

search_strategy.rationale: The coverage gap specifically asked for source-snapshot-backed registry surveillance. Exact NCT queries were used to fetch retained source snapshots for the deferred fisetin frailty registries; broader term queries were used to log current senolytic, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting registry surface.

hits.title: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Women
hits.agent_note: Study-specific v2 snapshot fetched; registry status is enrolling by invitation with no resultsSection.

hits.title: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Adults
hits.agent_note: Study-specific v2 snapshot fetched; registry status is enrolling by invitation with no resultsSection.

hits.title: Senescence in Chronic Kidney Disease
hits.agent_note: Direct D+Q senolytics hit with no posted results in search output; source snapshot path was not declared in this bounded job.

hits.title: An Open-Label Intervention Trial to Reduce Senescence and Improve Frailty in Adult Survivors of Childhood Cancer
hits.agent_note: Active direct senolytic hit; requires a future source-snapshot-backed pass before any no-results record.

hits.title: ALSENLITE: Senolytics for Alzheimer's Disease
hits.agent_note: Active D+Q Alzheimer's registry hit; requires a future source-snapshot-backed pass before any no-results record.

hits.title: Senolytics Treatment of Interstitial Lung Disease in Common Variable Immunodeficiency
hits.agent_note: Enrolling-by-invitation fisetin senolytics hit; requires a future source-snapshot-backed pass before any no-results record.

hits.title: Senolytics To slOw Progression of Sepsis (STOP-Sepsis) Trial
hits.agent_note: Recruiting fisetin senolytics hit; requires a future source-snapshot-backed pass before any no-results record.

hits.title: Senolytics to Improve Osteoporosis Therapy
hits.agent_note: Active D+Q senolytics hit; requires a future source-snapshot-backed pass before any no-results record.

hits.title: Fisetin to Improve Vascular Function in Older Adults
hits.agent_note: Already represented in the target coverage assessment as an active no-posted-results trial-watch source.

hits.title: Senolytic Therapy to Modulate the Progression of Alzheimer's Disease (SToMP-AD) Study
hits.agent_note: Already represented in the target coverage assessment as an active no-posted-results trial-watch source.

blocking_issues: The bounded job retained source snapshots only for NCT03430037 and NCT03675724; additional direct active/recruiting senolytic hits discovered by term surveillance require follow-up source snapshots before no-results records can be proposed.
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov v2 exact NCT queries returned and supported retained source snapshots for NCT03430037 and NCT03675724. Term surveillance returned 17 senolytics, 30 senolytic, 22 dasatinib quercetin, 840 literal D+Q, 34 fisetin, 4247 senescence targeting, and 4888 cellular senescence hits, with first-page retrieval for the broad queries. Screening included the two declared fisetin frailty registries and deferred other direct active/recruiting senolytic candidates until source snapshots can be fetched in a separately scoped repair.
next_actions: Run a follow-up ClinicalTrials.gov source-snapshot pass for additional deferred direct active/recruiting hits identified in this search log, prioritizing NCT02848131, NCT04733534, NCT04785300, NCT05593588, NCT05758246, and NCT06018467.
Use narrower senescence-targeting query syntax before screening the very broad D+Q and cellular-senescence result sets.
